user.title: Gaming Status Setup
user.description:
Configure your tracking ecosystem. You can change these settings later via the Global Settings menu.

*Note: To fetch automatic game cover art, please enter a SteamGridDB API Key. You can get a free key at [SteamGridDB]({api_url}).*

data_description.use_local_cache: Downloads artwork directly to your Home Assistant storage. Makes dashboard load times instant, allows for offline artwork access, and prevents broken images during Internet outages. *Note: If you do NOT have an external Home Assistant URL, using this setting will break Discord notification images.*

discord_setup.title: Discord Configuration
discord_setup.description:
Please provide your bot credentials. 

🛠️ **Developer Portal Requirement:**
Ensure the **Server Members Intent** is toggled ON under the Privileged Gateway Intents section for your bot.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Gaming Status can be configured.

manage_players.title: Manage Players
manage_players.description:
{player_count_text}

Select a player below to edit their settings, or select to add a new profile.

add_player.title: Add Player
add_player.description: Provide a name and enter the HA entity IDs for each platform this player uses. Leave blank for platforms they don't have.

edit_player.title: Edit Player | {player_name}
edit_player.description: Update platform entity IDs, or check **Delete this player** to completely remove them.

player_details.title: Player Details | {player_name}
player_details.description: Optional: Configure session notifications, ghost detection, and set per-player game exclusions.

data_description.notify_start_destinations: Select notification method(s) when this player starts gaming.
data_description.notify_end_destinations: Select notification method(s) when this player stops gaming.
data_description.ghosted_by: e.g. sensor.player_two_steam — Hides this player's status from that player's view.
data_description.exclude_games: e.g. Genshin Impact, Minecraft — Games to ignore for this player.

notifications.title: Notifications & Reporting
notifications.description: Configure where and how notifications are sent.

add_endpoint.title: Add Notification
add_endpoint.description: Configure a new gaming notification method.

data_description.endpoint_name: A friendly name, e.g. Dad's Phone
data_description.target_id: Required for Discord (Channel ID) or SMS (Phone Number).

discord_colors.title: Discord Notification Colors
discord_colors.description: Configure the embed colors universally for all Discord notification endpoints.

data_description.color_start: Used when color mode is set to Custom. e.g. #00FF00
data_description.color_end: Used when color mode is set to Custom. e.g. #FF0000
data_description.color_parental: Used when color mode is set to Custom. e.g. #0000FF

weekly_report.title: Weekly Report
weekly_report.description: Send a weekly gaming summary to the selected notification methods.

parental_controls.title: Parental Controls
parental_controls.description: Select a player to configure screen time and curfew rules.

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.description: Configure advanced integration behavior and API keys.

data.title_cleanups: Title Cleanups (Regex/Text to strip from titles)

global_settings.title: Global Settings
global_settings.description: Timing and behavior settings that apply to all players. **Only change these if you understand exactly what they do!**

data_description.enabled_platforms: Select which platforms should appear in the player configuration menus.
data_description.enable_notifications: Activates the Notifications & Reporting menu to configure session alerts and weekly summaries.
data_description.enable_parental: Activates the Parental Controls menu to set screen time limits and curfews.
data_description.use_local_cache: Downloads artwork to your local storage. Disable this to use raw web URLs (recommended if you use Discord notifications without remote HA access).
data_description.extract_colors: Automatically calculates the dominant vibrant color of game artwork for use in dashboard cards. *Note: This will be automatically ignored if Local Caching is disabled.*
data_description.cache_max_files: The maximum number of images to keep on your drive. Set to 0 for unlimited. Default: 200
data_description.cache_max_days: Delete images that have not been played in this many days. Set to 0 to disable. Default: 30
data_description.grace_period_seconds: How long to wait before marking a player offline. Default: 300 (5 min)
data_description.away_grace_period_seconds: How long to wait before marking a Steam Away player offline. Default: 600 (10 min)
data_description.game_transition_grace_seconds: Bridges small gaps between game launches so sessions stay continuous. Default: 120 (2 min)
data_description.min_session_duration: Sessions shorter than this are not counted in history. Default: 300 (5 min)
data_description.reset_history: Clear all accumulated session history when Home Assistant restarts.

custom_artwork.title: Custom Artwork & Colors
custom_artwork.description:
Override SteamGridDB by providing direct URLs to custom images, or set a custom dominant hex color for specific games. Format as a comma-separated list of key=value pairs. 

e.g., `Minecraft = {example_url}` or `Halo 3 = #F2AB0A`

error.name_exists: A player with that name already exists.
error.invalid_hex_color: Must be a valid 6-digit hex color code, e.g. #FF0000
